scripts.dev:
node -e "console.log('
  Local app (open in browser):
  http://localhost:5173

  API health check:
  http://localhost:3000/api/health
')" && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T mysql mysql -uroot -proot < db/seed.sql
